message:
feat(search): backfill existing messages into Tantivy index on startup

After init_bridge() succeeds, the server now scans all messages from the
database (joined with agents + projects for sender names and slugs) and
batch-indexes them into Tantivy. Uses a doc-count watermark to skip
backfill when the index is already up-to-date.

- Add backfill_from_db() to search_v3.rs: opens C-SQLite read-only
  connection, queries messages with sender/project metadata, batch-indexes
  in chunks of 500
- Add sqlmodel-sqlite dependency to mcp-agent-mail-db for backfill reads
- Wire backfill into init_search_bridge() in server startup (both HTTP
  and TUI paths)
- Failures are non-fatal (logged as warnings)

Closes br-2tnl.10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ sqlmodel-schema.workspace = true
 sqlmodel-session.workspace = true
 sqlmodel-pool.workspace = true
 sqlmodel-frankensqlite.workspace = true
+sqlmodel-sqlite.workspace = true
 
 # LRU cache
 indexmap.workspace = true
